meta.graph_scope: Enterprise knowledge graph for organizational structure, job descriptions, skills, topics, systems, and reporting relationships

nodes.label: Department
nodes.name: Supply Chain / Planning / Logistics / Customer Service

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Application Manager and Smart Factory
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Application Manager and Smart Factory.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads the application landscape that connects plant operations, core business processes, and smart factory initiatives. Owns the roadmap for manufacturing-related applications, coordinates cross-functional adoption, and ensures that industrial digitalization is practical, governed, and tied to business value.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Business Intelligence Developer
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Business Intelligence Developer.docx
nodes.role_summary: Designs and delivers reporting, dashboards, and data models that help business and operational teams make better decisions. Translates business questions into usable analytics outputs while balancing data quality, usability, and maintainability across multiple stakeholder groups.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Chief Operating Officer
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Chief Operating Officer.docx
nodes.location_context: Group / Multi-site (Europe HQ with frequent travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Group Operations agenda across manufacturing, supply chain execution, quality coordination, and operational transformation. Shapes the operating model needed for scale, resilience, and continuous improvement while aligning plant performance, service levels, and investment priorities with the company's growth ambitions.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Finance Director
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/Finance Director.docx
nodes.location_context: Enterprise / Multi-site (Europe HQ with regular travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Finance function with enterprise-wide responsibility for financial strategy, performance management, and control across all entities. Designs and builds scalable finance capabilities (processes, systems, governance) to support high growth, M&A integration, and continuous improvement, while safeguarding liquidity, compliance, and value creation.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Group Supply Chain Director
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Group Supply Chain Director.docx
nodes.department: Supply Chain / Planning / Logistics / Customer Service
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Group supply chain agenda across planning, logistics, customer service, and supply coordination. Balances service, inventory, capacity, and execution constraints to create a more reliable, responsive, and scalable supply model across markets and sites.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Head of Engineering and Reliability
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Head of Engineering and Reliability.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads technical reliability, engineering governance, and operational asset improvement for the plant. Builds the maintenance and engineering roadmap needed to improve uptime, technical stability, and delivery of process change while balancing capex, operational risk, and production realities.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Head of Group Quality
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Head of Group Quality.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Group quality agenda across food safety, compliance, quality systems, and operational quality performance. Sets the standards and governance needed to protect customers, brands, and operations while enabling scalable growth across sites and product categories.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Head of Group Research and Development
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Head of Group Research and Development.docx
nodes.role_name: Head of Group Research and Development
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Group's product innovation agenda, shaping the pipeline, standards, and delivery model for research and development. Connects commercial opportunity, technical feasibility, quality requirements, and operational readiness to bring viable innovation into the business at pace.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: HR Director
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/HR Director.docx
nodes.location_context: Group / Multi-site (Europe HQ with frequent travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Group HR function with enterprise-wide impact on policies, standards, and people outcomes across all production sites and offices. Sets the People strategy to enable high growth, M&A integration, and culture harmonization in a dynamic, fast-paced environment—building scalable processes from the ground up while safeguarding compliance and workforce engagement.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: HR Lead
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/HR Lead.docx
nodes.role_summary: The HR Manager ensures effective implementation of HR strategies and policies at the site level, supporting talent acquisition, employee engagement, and compliance. This role drives cultural integration, process development, and workforce planning to enable operational excellence and growth in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: HR Manager - Banska Bystrica Plant
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/HR Manager - Banska Bystrica Plant.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads site-level HR execution for the Banska Bystrica plant, ensuring that workforce planning, employee relations, onboarding, and people processes support stable plant operations. Acts as the main HR partner for local leadership while aligning site decisions with Group HR standards and legal requirements.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: HR Manager - Romania Country Organization
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/HR Manager - Romania Country Organization.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads HR execution for the Romania country organization, supporting commercial, office, and local operational teams with compliant people processes, hiring coordination, employee relations, and organizational support. Translates Group HR standards into practical local execution in a market-facing environment.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: IFS Application Specialist
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/IFS Application Specialist.docx
nodes.role_summary: Supports the reliability, usability, and continuous improvement of the IFS ERP landscape. Acts as a hands-on specialist for issue resolution, process understanding, testing, and user support across ERP workflows that affect plant, planning, finance, procurement, and operational execution.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: IT Director
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/IT Director.docx
nodes.location_context: Multi-site (Europe HQ with frequent travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
nodes.role_summary: Leads the IT function with enterprise-wide impact on technology strategy, policies, and platforms across all production sites and offices. Builds a scalable, secure, and data-enabled technology foundation to support high growth, M&A integration, and continuous improvement—standardizing the core stack while enabling local agility.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Key Account Manager - Czech Republic
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Key Account Manager - Czech Republic.docx
nodes.role_summary: Owns key customer relationships in the Czech market, balancing commercial growth, customer negotiation, forecasting input, and execution discipline. Acts as the main commercial interface for assigned accounts and translates customer priorities into actionable internal coordination.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Key Account Manager - Poland Modern Trade
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Key Account Manager - Poland Modern Trade.docx
nodes.role_summary: Owns modern trade key accounts in Poland, focusing on structured customer development, commercial negotiation, promotional planning, and channel execution. Operates in a more concentrated retailer environment with strong emphasis on account discipline, promotional mechanics, and execution quality.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Marketing Manager - Romania Local Market
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Marketing Manager - Romania Local Market.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads local marketing execution in Romania, adapting central brand direction to the realities of the local market, customers, and channels. Focuses on activation, campaign delivery, market relevance, and commercial support rather than central portfolio ownership.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Marketing Manager - Vienna HQ
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Marketing Manager - Vienna HQ.docx
nodes.role_summary: Supports the central marketing agenda from Vienna HQ, translating brand and portfolio strategy into coordinated campaigns, launch support, and communication materials across markets. Acts as a cross-functional coordinator between Marketing, Commercial, R&D, and external partners.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Master Data Governance Lead
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Master Data Governance Lead.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads the governance of critical master data domains to improve data quality, ownership clarity, and process consistency across the organization. Connects business process reality with governance discipline so that data standards become workable, not merely documented.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Plant Director
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Plant Director.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads the end-to-end performance of the plant, ensuring safe, efficient, and compliant production while coordinating people, assets, planning, quality, and support functions. Owns the local operating rhythm and translates Group priorities into disciplined plant execution.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Procurement Director
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/Procurement Director.docx
nodes.location_context: Group (covering all production sites and sales subsidiaries)
nodes.role_summary: Leads the Group’s strategic procurement function, defining sourcing strategies, supplier partnerships, and risk management frameworks to ensure long-term competitiveness and sustainability. This role focuses on building procurement capabilities, driving cost optimization, and supporting growth initiatives such as M&A and new product development, rather than day-to-day operational purchasing.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Production Planning Manager
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Production Planning Manager.docx
nodes.role_summary: Leads production planning for the site or assigned manufacturing scope, turning supply requirements into achievable schedules that balance demand, capacity, inventory, and operational constraints. Coordinates closely with plant, supply chain, and customer-facing functions to keep execution realistic and responsive.

nodes.label: JobDescription
nodes.name: Project and Process Engineer
nodes.relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Project and Process Engineer.docx
nodes.role_summary: Supports plant performance through structured process improvement, technical project delivery, and practical problem-solving on production systems. Combines engineering analysis with hands-on implementation to improve line stability, throughput, and execution quality.
